headlines.title: Microsoft AI chief gives it 18 months—for all white-collar work to be automated by AI
headlines.description: Mustafa Suleyman believes current AI computational power will only accelerate, disrupting every kind of work you do “sitting down at a computer.”
headlines.summary: Microsoft AI chief Mustafa Suleyman predicts most white‑collar work automated by AI within 18 months.
headlines.why_it_matters: Signals how fast enterprises may adopt AI copilots, reshaping required skills and product roadmaps.

headlines.title: SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic: Here are the most anticipated IPOs in 2026

headlines.title: The Critical Warning Hidden in Anthropic’s US-China AI Stance
headlines.description: The escalating competition between the United States and China in artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping global power dynamics, with far-reaching implications for governance and societal norms. In a detailed analysis, Matthew Berman highlights Anthropic’s …
headlines.summary: Anthropic’s stance on US‑China AI policy is examined as a warning about global AI rivalry.
headlines.why_it_matters: Geopolitics will shape access to compute, talent, and markets for AI builders and vendors.

headlines.title: The most-cited computer scientist alive says AI could make humanity extinct within a decade
headlines.description: Yoshua Bengio, the Turing Award-winning computer scientist widely regarded as one of the godfathers of artificial intelligence, has renewed his warning that hyperintelligent machines could pose an existential threat to humanity within the next decade. In an i…
headlines.summary: Yoshua Bengio warns advanced AI could cause human extinction within the next decade.
headlines.why_it_matters: Raises urgency for safety research, governance, and risk assessments in deployed AI systems.

headlines.title: AI becoming infrastructure of intelligence: TCS chairman N Chandrasekaran
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence is now the core operating system for businesses worldwide. TCS Chairman N Chandrasekaran stated AI services are generating billions in revenue. The company is building secure AI infrastructure and an AI operating system for industries.…
headlines.summary: TCS chairman says AI is becoming the core operating system and infrastructure for businesses.
headlines.why_it_matters: Confirms large‑scale enterprise demand for AI platforms, integration, and services across industries.

headlines.title: AI reshaping venture capital's economics, new models for valuation and liquidity: World Economic Forum
headlines.description: The industry must adapt its capital structures, regulatory frameworks and talent ecosystems to support a new era of capital-efficient, infrastructure-heavy growth
headlines.summary: World Economic Forum outlines how AI is reshaping venture capital economics and valuation models.
headlines.why_it_matters: Affects how AI startups are funded, scaled, and evaluated, influencing product and growth strategies.

headlines.title: Google, SpaceX Reportedly In Talks For Orbital Data Centers Ahead Of Musk's Mammoth IPO

headlines.title: Will Your Android Be Compatible? Google Reveals Minimum System Requirements For Gemini Intelligence
headlines.description: Google has disclosed the system requirements for its upcoming Gemini Intelligence ecosystem. According to documentation found on an official product page, the advanced artificial intelligence features will not be universally compatible with all Android device…
headlines.summary: Google reveals minimum Android hardware requirements to run its Gemini Intelligence ecosystem.
headlines.why_it_matters: Helps mobile developers plan which devices can support on‑device Gemini features and experiences.

headlines.title: The 5 most unhinged revelations from Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI
headlines.description: Friendship breakups are never easy, but few are as messy and expensive as the collapse of Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s once thriving tech bromance. On Thursday, closing arguments wrapped up in Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI, leaving a jury to deliberate next wee…
headlines.summary: Vox details key claims from Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI over its direction and deals.
headlines.why_it_matters: Reveals governance, safety, and commercialization tensions around frontier models and big‑tech partnerships.

headlines.title: Agents are a manager’s dream for productivity — and a CISO’s worst nightmare when they go rogue
headlines.description: Agent risk management is evolving rapidly as AI moves into consequential decision-making arenas, collapsing the boundary between human and machine risk across the enterprise. The dual-threat landscape now confronting enterprises means no longer worrying about…
headlines.summary: Article explains how autonomous AI agents boost productivity but create new security and control risks.
headlines.why_it_matters: Practitioners must design guardrails, monitoring, and policies before deploying agentic systems in production.
